text.message: Oj takes game very personally. Just a warning to you. So you should never plow him never rob him or never block him
green plowed me last game to end my game so i solod them
according to green i gotta be really mad at you now and take it personally red
red you think the 2 or the 12 is gonna hit first
i bet you an ore the 12 hits first
I would do nb but now i want my ore back
ill put a nb on this green
they were going wild when i robbed them last game tho
so cheap when he has 10 cards
can offer a trade to bot race
didnt want to bring blue under
oj got road potential and your going for me?
im pretty much out of this game
man if blue had 3 vps they woulda won this turn
or blue can snag w win
will trade when i get some
